subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Lord and my Support! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Bountiful Name. Glorified art Thou, O my God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و سیدی و سندی اسئلک باسمک الفضال و سبحانک اللهم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment
